follow_ups.note: Integration tests for create/list/stop/delete against a live Docker daemon were not written. Follow-up in a future QA plan.
ai-sandbox list when Docker daemon is down prints 'No sandboxes found.' A future improvement could distinguish daemon-not-running from no managed containers.

Phase 04 (Tests and QA Gate) was not executed. Unit tests for --add-marketplace/--enable-plugin/--enable-all flag parsing, generate_volume_override with file:// marketplaces, and profile-installer JSON output were not written. Carry forward into the next plan's QA phase.
mid-task-commit.sh operates on the main checkout rather than the task worktree. Mid-task checkpoints were committed manually instead. Investigate and fix or document.

decisions.note: Label-only instance state: no XDG state files. Existence is determined from docker ps -a --filter label=ai.sandbox.managed=true.
stop preserves the container (docker compose stop); delete removes it (docker compose down). cleanup_stale_container treats exited as healthy.

Plugin marketplace refs are passed through the container environment as pipe-separated strings (AI_SANDBOX_MARKETPLACES, AI_SANDBOX_PLUGINS) rather than colon-separated, because marketplace URLs contain colons.
The 10-plugin-setup cont-init script runs claude CLI commands as the host user so ~/.claude resolves to the bind-mounted directory with correct ownership.
